{{Infobox location
| name = Advocate prison
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocates]] have prisons.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocate prison]] is a location surveyed by Shyrax.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The food in an [[Advocate prison]] is made of replicated bricks.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c13">''The Engineer'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator fears being taken into the [[Advocate prison]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c48">''The Engineer'', chapter 48</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
